allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove output_format from images/edits FormData — not supported by edits endpoint *)

PowerShell(Get-Command pg_dump -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; if \(-not \(Get-Command pg_dump -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\PostgreSQL" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); z=d['result'][0]; print\('Status:',z['status']\); print\('Cloudflare NS:',z['name_servers']\); print\('Current registrar NS:',z['original_name_servers']\)")
